chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D-5503 / 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ PRIORITY 1) For orders on office objection. 2) For hearing of CMA No. 22961/2025. 3) For hearing of main case. 25.11.2025. Mr. Munir-ul-Haq, Advocate for Petitioner Mr. K. A. Vaswani, Assistant Advocate General. ___________________ Counsel submits that the bidder who was declared technically qualified by the Procuring Agency, had no past experience. However, learned counsel acknowledges that against such grievance the Petitioner filed a complaint to the Complaint Redressal Committee which has been recently dismissed. That being so, the Petitioner has remedy of appeal before the Review Committee under Rule 32 of the Sindh Public Procurement Rules, 2010. Therefore, the petition is dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Arshad/
